mainHeading: We build agentic-native data systems that make AI useful in production.
description1: Since our founding, we have focused on structured data for agents: document intelligence, multimodal training sets, and synthetic reasoning traces that can be trusted in real workflows.
description2: We combine research fluency, delivery rigor, and lattice-based system design to turn raw enterprise inputs into machine-readable assets for training, evaluation, and automation.
foundedValue: Agentic systems for production data work.
watchStoryValue: Strategy, research, and execution in one stack.
operatingModelDesc: Research-grade data design, production-grade execution, and measurable outcomes for enterprise AI teams.
